impl_review_summary.vendor_diversity_dividend: Each vendor caught issues the others missed: codex flagged spec/code path drift + write-shim filename loss; gemini caught quorum accounting + cross-platform fsync; claude_code spotted .tmp file leak. Single-vendor review would have missed at least 5 of the 7 findings.

round_2_findings.R2_C4_os_replace_outside_try: claude_code caught os.replace not wrapped (narrow leak window)

impl_review_round_2_summary.convergence_pattern: round 1 found 7 findings (1 blocking via 3-vendor consensus); round 2 found 6 findings (3 blocking — all incomplete-fix verifications). Round 2 caught real bugs in round-1 fixes, not new code issues. Net: 13 findings surfaced + addressed; multi-vendor convergence required 2 rounds.

escalation_resolved: User chose option 1 in round 1: re-frame as durable-checkpoint + manual recovery. Plan rewritten across 4 iterations addressing 30+ findings. LOC estimate dropped from 1190 to 720.
